news.t: Global X Announces Five ETF Reverse Stock Splits
Biotech ETFs surge on vaccine rollout, Alexion-AstraZeneca tie-up
Three tech subgroups can keep climbing despite the sector's record run, ETF analyst says

holdings.infoBox: GNOM is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are Guardant Health stock at 5.75%, Legend Biotech at 5.41%, Illumina at 4.83%, Twist Bioscience at 4.58%, and BioMarin Pharmaceutical at 4.04%.

overview.description: The Global X Genomics & Biotechnology ETF (GNOM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive Genomics index. The fund tracks an index of global biotech equities, selected and weighted by market cap. GNOM was launched on Apr 5, 2019 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Global X Announces Five ETF Reverse Stock Splits
data.text: NEW YORK, Aug. 18, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Global X Management Company, LLC ("Global X"), the New York-based provider of exchange traded funds (ETFs), today announced reverse splits of the following five...

data.title: Biotech ETFs surge on vaccine rollout, Alexion-AstraZeneca tie-up
data.text: Biotech exchange-traded funds rallied Monday as the rollout of the coronavirus vaccine across America shed a bullish light on the industry. The First Trust NYSE Arca Biotechnology Index Fund jumped 4%...

data.title: Three tech subgroups can keep climbing despite the sector's record run, ETF analyst says
data.text: Investors should consider buying into genomics, cloud computing and video gaming ETFs as tech trades near records, Global X's Jay Jacobs says.
